summary: Completed testing of Verified Case Law Database integration. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified: Case Law tab appears in CaseDetail page, CaseLawPanel displays search bar and database links, search bar pre-fills with case metadata, NSW case shows NSW CaseLaw and AustLII-NSW databases, national databases section is collapsible, database links have external link icons and open in new tabs, Grounds tab search boxes show JADE/NSW CaseLaw/QLD Judgments/Google Scholar quick-links. Code review confirms grounds refresh bug fix is in place.

minor.issue: Some state courts (VIC, SA, WA, ACT) don't have direct search URLs - they link to judgment pages instead. This is by design as these courts don't offer public search APIs.

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: CaseLawPanel.jsx correctly fetches and displays state-specific and national databases
VERIFIED: GroundsOfMerit.jsx lines 757-770 show JADE, NSW CaseLaw, QLD Judgments, Google Scholar quick-links with ExternalLink icons
VERIFIED: CaseDetail.jsx handleAutoIdentifyGrounds (lines 617-658) ALWAYS refreshes grounds list after completion - bug fix confirmed
VERIFIED: Backend caselaw_search.py has all 8 Australian states/territories configured with databases
VERIFIED: Backend caselaw.py router has /caselaw/databases, /cases/{case_id}/caselaw/search, /cases/{case_id}/caselaw/ground/{ground_id} endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Case Law feature fully tested. Backend endpoints /api/caselaw/databases and /api/cases/{case_id}/caselaw/search work correctly. Frontend CaseLawPanel and GroundsOfMerit search boxes display all required database links. All links open in new tabs with external link icons.

grounds_refresh_bug_fix.code_review: VERIFIED - handleAutoIdentifyGrounds always refreshes grounds list after completion (lines 628-632)

empty_state_hidden_during_scan.code_review: VERIFIED - autoIdentifying state controls visibility of empty state vs progress indicator
